scenario: Repeated charging notifications appear when one Free20 earbud is worn and the other is placed in the open charging case on iOS
description_clean: When using Free20 earbuds on iOS (builds 53/54), if one earbud is worn and the other is placed in the unplugged, open charging case, repeated charging notifications appear instead of a single notification. Expected behavior is one charging notification since only one earbud is charging.
steps: 1. Ensure you have Free20 earbuds and an iOS device running build 53 or 54.
2. Wear one earbud (e.g., left) in your ear.
3. Place the other earbud (e.g., right) into the unplugged, open charging case.
4. Observe the charging notifications on the iOS device.
expected: A single charging notification should appear, since only one earbud is charging.
actual: Repeated charging notifications appear instead of a single notification.
